one_time_description: Exclusion of Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company from consolidation; if included, surplus would increase by $26,675,845 for 2022. Also unrecorded royalty overpayment liability of $8,027,889.
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including gas bar, real estate, automotive, restaurants, art gallery, ambulance authority, medical services, bingo, construction, and oil & gas properties. Kisoniyaminaw Heritage Trust Fund valued at $539M. Nipisihkopahk Iyinisiwin Trust Fund valued at $39M. Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company excluded from consolidation but pay dividends.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company are excluded from consolidation contrary to PSAB standards - if included, accumulated surplus would increase by $192,903,009 and annual surplus by $26,675,845; (2) A royalty overpayment liability of $8,027,889 has not been recorded as the Nation disputes the judgment and has filed an appeal (agreement in principle reached May 24, 2022 post year-end). The accumulated surplus of $678,269,491 on the balance sheet includes $54,941,665 of accumulated remeasurement gains; the $623,327,826 figure represents operating accumulated surplus only. The Kisoniyaminaw Heritage Trust Fund ($539M) and Nipisihkopahk Iyinisiwin Trust Fund ($39M) are large trust fund assets consolidated into the financial statements. Financial statements dated September 27, 2022.
